feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Make Custom Field read-only that is added using Custom Fields and Logic Fiori app (F1481)
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We added a Custom Field in Fiori app Post Goods Receipt for Purchasing Document (F0843A) using Custom Field and Logic Fiori app (F1481) with Business Context Accounting: Coding Block (FINS_CODING_BLOCK) and enabled it for OData service's (MMIM_GR4PO_DL_SRV ) Item entity, GR4PO_DL_Item. Now, we want to set this field to Read-only but we are not able to find correct way to set it.

We noticed that when we created this custom field, another custom field was also created in the background of type CFD_CUSTOM_UI_FIELD_CONTROL for structure MMIM_GR4PO_DL_ITEM, which seems like a field for field properties control, but we are not sure how to use this or change the behaviour using this field. This additional field is not available/visible when we are writing logic in Custom Logic app (F6957), only the created custom field is shown.

Does anyone also faced this issue and can suggest how to proceed?

Best regards

Ankur

entry.title: SAP NWBC mdg
entry.content:
Hi All,

we have a new requirement where in we need to auto-populate Business partner details and address in the MDG NWBC screen. The problem is we can populate the BP details like name (BP_HEADER) and show in the screen but not the address(AD_POSTAL). Anyone have encounter similar requirement before?

entry.title: gCTS Disadvantages - Experiences
entry.content:
Hello Community,
we are considering introducing the Git‑based version control that is natively supported by S/4HANA.
Does anyone have real‑life experience with it?
I am also very interested in any disadvantages or obstacles you may have encountered.

Thanks in advance for any answers.

Ralf

entry.title: While creating QN attachment in API I am getting the authorization error
entry.content:
I have successfully posted the Quality Notification via API IN PUBLIC CLOUD. After creation while trying to create an attachment in Quality Notification using API /sap/opu/odata/sap/API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV/AttachmentContentSet, I am getting authorization error. I have used the system credentials SAP_COM_0153 (which is used for QN).

Kindly help me in resolving this issue

entry.title: RAP‑Based Service Does Not Support Aggregation Totals with Filters and Group‑By with Crud
entry.content:
Problem Description:

We are implementing a Fiori Elements List Report using a RAP‑based OData service (OData V2 or V4).
The business requirement is to show aggregated totals (SUM) for multiple numeric columns. These totals must update dynamically whenever:

  • Filters are applied
  • Group By is enabled
  • Group levels expand/collapse
  • Sorting or table personalization is applied

Most Important Requirement:

When the List Report table is grouped, the system must display an aggregation subtotal row for each group (group-level total), not only a grand total.

However, RAP currently does not allow analytical annotations or analytical CDS entities to be used with transactional behavior. Because of this limitation:

  • We cannot enable annotations such as
    • @analytics.query: true
    • @DefaultAggregation: #SUM
    • @Aggregation.default: #SUM
  • RAP services cannot perform backend aggregations or expose group-level totals.
  • As a result, neither grand totals nor group-level totals can appear in the List Report.

Observed Limitation:

Backend (RAP):

  • RAP business objects with behavior definitions do not support analytical CDS views.
  • Aggregations and group-by queries are not supported in RAP OData V2 or OData V4.
  • Analytical annotations cannot be used on projection or interface views participating in RAP.

entry.title: ABAP : Compiled language or Interpreted language
entry.content: Is ABAP a compiled language or interpreted language ?

entry.title: CDS view for accessing customer group(sales area) in a customer master
entry.content:
I want to know the CDS view which can return me the customer group inside a BADI:_SD_SLS_CHECK_BEFORE_SAVE  based on customer as an input

Please advice

#CDS

entry.title: PATCH operation failed on API_SALES_ORDER_SRV
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I am going to update two fields one from header i.e "PurchaseOrderByCustomer"  and another from Item "RequestedQuantity".
These two fields available in A_SalesOrderItem EntitySet. But when I am doing PATCH operation only "RequestedQuantity" is updating not "PurchaseOrderByCustomer". 

I am using  url 
/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_SALES_ORDER_SRV/A_SalesOrderItem(SalesOrder='7000000223',SalesOrderItem='0010')

{

    "PurchaseOrderByCustomer": "Alex",

    "RequestedQuantity": "20"

}

Is it not possible to update header field from item ? Is $batch operation work on this API ?

Can you please help me on this?

entry.title: S/4HANA 2025: gCTS 'Synchronous Push' issue with GitLab repository
entry.content:
Hi,

I configured gCTS with a GitLab repository in an SAP S/4HANA 2025 environment. While commits work correctly upon releasing the transports, I have encountered an issue with the 'Push Objects' functionality during synchronous execution.

Debugging the point of failure reveals that the exception occurs because the system cannot identify the API user.

Comparing this method with gCTS in S/4HANA 2023, I noticed that the API object is only instantiated when using GitHub. Since I am using GitLab, the code to retrieve the API object is bypassed, which is why 'Synchronous Push Object' works correctly in that version.

Is anyone else experiencing this error using gCTS on S/4HANA 2025 + GitLab during a 'Synchronous Push Object'? If you're using gCTS on S/4HANA 2025 +GitHub instead, I’d appreciate your feedback to confirm if the functionality works in that setup.

Thank you,
Alfonso.

entry.title: Different Header in XML schema based interface with gateway in sap s4 hana ADOBE forms
entry.content:
Hi

I am using Master form template to display logo and fotter and content form template for content my requirement is to have 2 different header fields in first page and second page. i.e after logo i want 5 fields in first page and 2 fields in second page and so on.  Could you let me know how to achieve different headers using XML schema based interface in sap s4 hana 

Thanks

entry.title: How do you manipulate the values of STXH, COBL, VBPA during Sales order creation or VA01?
entry.content: Which user-exit should I use for manipulation of values of the STXH, COBL, and VBPA when sales order creation?

entry.title: Timeout in RAP Action
entry.content:
I have a Rap app with an action in a table that is partially executed on up to 100,000 items. Processing then takes place in the backend for each location. Since this process takes a certain amount of time per item, it can take several hours for the entire logic to be completed. As a result, the process aborts in the frontend with a timeout.

I solved the problem by running the processing in an RFC module in the background. The customer does not want to extend the session length that causes the timeout. My question now is whether there are other alternatives to solve this problem?

entry.title: Have problem on downloading trials.
entry.content:
I'm a student trying to download trial version of ABAP Developer Edition 7.52 SP04.

I could access to download page (https://www.sap.com/products/try-sap/trials-downloads.htm)

and Terms & Conditions page.

But whenever I submit it,  page returns "Unfortunately, a technical error occurred when processing your request. Please try again." messagre.

I've rebooted my PC several times but Still, I couldn't download it. 

Is there any maintenamce on going in this page?

or Do I have other page to Download it?

entry.title: VA01 Item Overview Sorting
entry.content:
Is it possible to change how the order of items are being displayed/sorted in VA01 Item Overview? 

This is how the items are being sorted once I create them. The grandchild is being sorted on top due to a requirement for how the POSNR is being incremented:

  • 4. Grandchild
  • 1. Grandparent
  • 2. Parent
  • 3.  Child

I need to sort it like this:

  • 1. Grandparent
  • 2. Parent
  • 3.  Child
  • 4. Grandchild

Is there a way to sort it using a different field in VBAP instead of POSNR?

entry.title: New GL: account assignment table
entry.content:
Hi,

I have to retrieve data from the new GL tables in cds view, so that I cannot use any FM. As of standard, in FAGLFLEXA the CO object assignment is missing. In which table can I find the CO object for PL account line items?

thanks to all

entry.title: Any standard utility in ABAP to retrieve a version of abap dev object from Remote system
entry.content:
Hi All,

 So basically, when we go to version management of an abap development object and retrieve a remote version from Prod to DEV, is it possible to do the same thing programmatically in abap via any standard SAP utility or workaround?

So i know we can compare the versions via the standard FM's between DEV and Prod but i also want to write abap code to retrieve and overwrite the DEV version with Prod (just like we do manually in version management using retrieve button)

entry.title: ADT Code Completion is (Still) Slow
entry.content:
Hello all,

as mentioned in a previous Q&A which was not answered, ADT code completion is still unusably slow.

When typing in SE38 with my normal typing speed, I can eaily get code completions when pressing tab:

https://streamable.com/012r9y

However, when typing with the same speed in eclipse I am always too fast for the code completion, as it takes roughly twice as long to show compared to SE38

https://streamable.com/i9o363

So in Eclipse I would need to actively wait:

https://streamable.com/fcqgp0

Which is simply unacceptable. This needs to be fixed ASAP.

entry.title: I copied a standard form with SBF transactioin, but the new form does not display transaction data
entry.content:
Hi,

I copy standard form /SCWM/HU_SHPLABEL by clicking the copy icon and created a new ZSHP label. I also activated it.

I did this only with the form not with the interface, maybe that is what I am missing.

My problem is that when I test the form only the static text is coming up (titles) not the transaction data, like it will show DATE: but then nothing, and when I use the standard form it works.

Does anyone have an idea what i did wrong?

entry.title: Dynamic programming in RAP for excel upload
entry.content:
Hello All, 

We have a requirement to have a single interface in RAP, which can upload excel data to around 30 tables that we select via drop-down or screen. 

In the report program, we have an option upload excel to tables with dynamic programming with minimum efforts. We were achieving this by maintaining the tables in tvarvc, using the system classes and use Excel upload to populate the tables, and this would rarely require any enhancement.

Is there any way that we can do the same in RAP framework, as creating i view, c view. Meta data extension and behaviour definition for 30 tables is a tedious task.

Regards 

Naga

entry.title: How do you modify the values of Partner Function or VBPA-PARVW?
entry.content:
In VA01, I am trying to manipulate the values of Partner Function or VBPA-PARVW but encountered an error. Instead of displaying Sold-to Party, it only shows SP. 

However, before my code took effect, the values being displayed were any of these:
